Q6 Not checked
General Aptitude • CIVIL ENGINEERING • Intermediate • +2 / -0.66
Not attempted

It takes six technicians a total of 10 hour to build a new server from direct, computer, with each working at the same rate. If six technicians starts to build the server at 10 AM, and one technician per hour is added beginning at 4 PM, at what time will the server be completed?

Correct answer: D
Solution

(d)
Total amount of work = 60 man-hours
From 10 AM to 4 pm, 6 technicians = 36 – man hours
From 4 PM to 5 PM, 7 technicians = 7 man hours
From 5 PM to 6 PM, 8 technicians = 8 man hours
From 6 PM to 7 PM, 9 technicians = 9 man-hours
Total = 60 man hours

Q7 Not checked
General Aptitude • CIVIL ENGINEERING • Intermediate • +1 / -0.33
Not attempted

Choose the missing term to complete the given series
3, 5, 10, 12, 24, 26, 52, ?

Correct answer: C
Solution

(c)
3 × 1 + 2 = 5
5 × 2 + 0 = 10
10 × 1 + 2 = 12
12 × 2 + 0 = 24
24 × 1 + 2 = 26
26 × 2 + 0 = 52
52 × 1 + 2 = 54

Q20 Not checked
Technical • MECHANICAL ENGINEERING • +1 / -0.33
Not attempted

A plant layout in which machines performing similar operations are grouped together, and are not arranged according to any particular sequence of operations is known as

Correct answer: B
Solution

(b)
In process layout, the work stations and machinery are not arranged according to a particular production sequence. Instead, there is an assembly of similar operations or similar machinery in each department. (For example: a drill department, a point department, etc.)

Q62 Not checked
Technical • MECHANICAL ENGINEERING • +2 / -0
Not attempted

A capillary tube is inserted in a tank and the corresponding capillary rise is h. When the capillary tube is cut and its length is then h′ as shown in figure below.

Which of the following statement(s) is/are correct for shorter capillary tube?
(a) the liquid starts flowing out from the tube
(b) the liquid does not overflow.
(c) h is given by the expression
(d) h is given by the expression
where, σ = surface tension of liquid-tube interface, ρ = density of liquid, D = diameter of the tube

Correct answer: N/A
Solution

(b, c)
When the capillary tube is cut, then the liquid rise above the top of the tube and spreads in such a way that the radius (R) of liquid meniscus increases and it becomes more flat so that hR = constant. Hence, the liquid does not overflow.
